title: Ethiopian-Inspired Wrap
description: A fusion of flavors from Ethiopia and the comfort of a wrap. This dish combines the crunch of injera with the savory taste of garlicky chicken.

ingredients.name: Ethiopian Spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: Season the chicken breast with Ethiopian Spices and cook in the oven for 20-25 minutes.
While the chicken is cooking, heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Warm the injera slices in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
Assemble the wraps by placing a slice of chicken, some garlic, and a sprinkle of Ethiopian Spices on each injera slice.
Top with a slice of wrap and serve immediately.
